name: Beetroot with Yuzu
steps: Combine all the ingredients together in kenwood.
Mix until smooth dough is formed.
Wrap the beets in the dough. The dough should be at least 1cm thick.
Bake in the oven for 1 hour at 170C until the beets are cooked.
Once cooked, allow to cool then remove from the dough.
Break 250g of the dough into pieces roughly.
Mix all the ingredients together and let steep overnight.
Mix all ingredients together in a vacuum bag and seal.
